hero.title: Master Hair Studio
hero.subtitle: Where traditional craftsmanship meets modern style

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From classic cuts to modern styles, we offer comprehensive grooming services tailored to your needs.

mensHaircut.name: Men's Haircut
mensHaircut.description: Individual men's haircut tailored to face shape, hair texture, and personal style. Includes clean styling. Focused service – precise, professional, no add-ons.

mensHaircutPro.name: Gentleman Package
mensHaircutPro.description: Wash + Haircut + Beard + Eyebrows + Waxing (Ears, Nose & Contours) + Deep Cleansing Nose Mask. The complete grooming experience in one appointment.

beardTrim.name: Beard Trim / Classic Shave
beardTrim.description: Professional beard shaping and precise contours. Traditional wet shave (for Classic Shave). Aftershave and finishing care.

pricing.title: Personalized Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Our experienced hairdressers offer services at different pricing levels based on their expertise and specializations. Choose your preferred hairdresser during booking to see exact pricing.
pricing.noteDescription: Prices shown are starting rates. Each hairdresser has their own pricing based on experience and specializations. Final pricing will be confirmed when you select your preferred hairdresser during the booking process.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded with a passion for classic barbering and modern style, Loyal Haarschnitt has become a cornerstone of the community. We blend traditional techniques with contemporary trends to deliver exceptional grooming experiences.

booking.title: Book Your Appointment
booking.subtitle: Schedule your visit to Loyal Haarschnitt in just a few simple steps
booking.noSlots: No available slots for this date
booking.noAvailableSlots: No available slots for selected date
booking.noteText: We'll send a confirmation email and may call to confirm your appointment. Please arrive 5 minutes early for your scheduled time.

success.title: Appointment Booked Successfully!
success.message: Thank you for choosing Loyal Haarschnitt. We've received your booking request and will contact you shortly to confirm your appointment.

booking.widerrufshinweis: Note on the right of withdrawal: For online bookings of services (§ 356 para. 4 BGB), the right of withdrawal expires once the hairdresser has begun performing the service and you have explicitly agreed that the hairdresser may begin before the withdrawal period expires. By submitting your booking, you expressly consent to this.
booking.widerrufsCheckbox: I expressly agree that performance of the service may begin before the 14-day withdrawal period expires, and I acknowledge that my right of withdrawal will be extinguished as a result.

footer.description: Experience the finest in hairstyling services at Loyal Haarschnitt. Our skilled hairdressers combine traditional techniques with modern style to give you the perfect cut.

bio.line1: Trained in Munich, certified Master Craftsman and Business Economist in the skilled trades.
bio.line2: Specialized in precise, modern men's haircuts.
bio.line3: My focus: clean work, honest advice, and high-quality results.

impressum.title: Legal Notice (Impressum)
impressum.legalNote: Information according to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)

section3.title: Responsible for content according to § 55 para. 2 RStV

section4.title: Professional Regulations
section4.verliehenValue: German Crafts Code (HwO), Vocational Training Regulation for Hairdressers

section5.title: EU Dispute Resolution
section5.euText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
section5.noObligation: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

section6.title: Liability for Content
section6.text: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general law pursuant to § 7 para. 1 DDG. According to §§ 8 to 10 DDG, however, we as a service provider are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information in accordance with general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the point in time at which a concrete infringement of the law becomes known. If we become aware of any such violations, we will remove the relevant content immediately.

section7.title: Liability for Links
section7.text: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content of those pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not apparent at the time of linking. If we become aware of any legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.

s1.title: 1. Controller
s1.text: The controller within the meaning of the GDPR for the processing of personal data on this website is:

s2.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
s2.text: When using this website, the following personal data may be processed:
s2.item1: Name and contact details (when booking an appointment or submitting a contact request)
s2.item3: Technical data: IP address, browser type, access times (server logs pursuant to § 25 TDDDG)
s2.item4: Messages you send us via the contact form

s3.title: 3. Appointment Booking
s3.text: For online appointment booking, we collect and process the following data:
s3.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR (contract performance). Data is used solely for appointment management and deleted after the statutory retention period.

s4.title: 4. Contact Form
s4.text: When you send us a message via the contact form, the data you enter (name, phone number, message) is stored to process your enquiry.
s4.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in responding to enquiries).

s5.title: 5. Data Disclosure
s5.text: Your personal data will not be passed on to third parties, sold or rented unless this is necessary for the performance of the contract (e.g. hosting provider) or we are legally obliged to do so. All service providers used are carefully selected and process data exclusively in accordance with our instructions (order processing pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR).

s6.title: 6. Retention Period
s6.text: Personal data is only stored for as long as necessary for the respective purpose or as required by statutory retention obligations. Booking data is deleted after expiry of the tax retention period (10 years). Contact enquiries are deleted after full processing, at the latest after 3 years.

s7.title: 7. Your Rights (Data Subject Rights)
s7.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

r1.name: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR)
r1.desc: You can request information about the data we process about you.

r2.name: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR)
r2.desc: You can request the correction of inaccurate data.

r3.name: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR)
r3.desc: You can request the deletion of your data, provided no statutory retention obligations apply.

r4.name: Right to restriction (Art. 18 GDPR)
r4.desc: You can request the restriction of processing of your data.

r5.name: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR)
r5.desc: You can object to the processing of your data.

s7.contact: To exercise your rights, please contact us at
s7.supervisory: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority

r6.name: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
r6.desc: You can request that we provide your personal data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format.

s8.title: 8. Cookies
s8.text: This website uses only technically necessary cookies to ensure the functionality of the website (e.g. language settings, session management). No tracking or advertising cookies are used. Consent is not required for technically necessary cookies (§ 25 para. 2 TDDDG). Any optional cookies or third-party services used are subject to the requirements of the TDDDG as applicable.

s9.title: 9. Changes to this Privacy Policy
s9.text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy as necessary to reflect changes in legal requirements or changes to our services. The current version is available on this page. We recommend reviewing the privacy policy regularly.
